research_notes: Found detailed executive information on company profile page (https://www.alink-group.co.jp/company/profile/). Listed 5 officers: 1 representative director (桜井容子), 3 directors (法原敏博, 久保重成, 白須英大), 1 auditor (橋口渉). Parent company: 株式会社CIJ (TSE Prime market). Part of CIJ group since 2021-07. Capital: 50M yen. Located in Yokohama (新横浜). ISO/IEC 27001 certified (2025). Software development, SES, offshore development, product development. Has Philippines offshore subsidiary (i-BRIDGE).
